name: xuanjian-symphony
summary: Jira 一句话需求到调研、Figma、开发交接和 Design QA 的文件化工作流
purpose: XUANJIAN 专属的 Jira 需求到研发验收工作流。外层由本文件定义固定 Gate；内层按需使用 superpowers 做澄清、方案、TDD、调试、验证和 review。

source.whenToRead: Read the full scene when this scene is selected or the task needs chain-specific execution details.

whyThisComposition: This scene describes Jira 一句话需求到调研、Figma、开发交接和 Design QA 的文件化工作流.

operationGuide.startup: Load entry/profile/task JSON first, then read the scene markdown only if the workflow is selected.
notes: This scene controls AI workflow, not a software runtime.

readPolicy.notes: Do not load every project in the scene. Select projects based on the user request first.
